name: Classic Chicken Stock
recipeInstructions:
1. In a soup pot, bring the chicken bones to a boil in 3 quarts of cold water.
2. Add all remaining ingredients. Return to a boil, then reduce heat to a gentle simmer.
3. Simmer for two hours, skimming fat and foam from the surface as needed.
4. Strain the liquid through cheesecloth if available. Season with salt to taste.
You can store in refrigerator for up to two weeks or freeze for months. For freezing, portion into ice cube trays.
To create a reduced demi-glace suitable for sauces, simmer the stock an additional two hours.
